allow: Bash(source .env 2>/dev/null; curl -s "https://licenseportal.aiengineeringlab.co.uk/v1/models" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${LITELLM_API_KEY:-sk-LtwlzAi6TbyfE1npP_yS7Q}" | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null || echo "curl failed")

Bash(source .env 2>/dev/null && curl -s "${LITELLM_BASE_URL}/v1/models" -H "Authorization: Bearer ${LITELLM_API_KEY}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['id']\) for m in data.get\('data',[]\)]" 2>/dev/null || echo "Could not read .env or list models")
Bash(source .env && ANTHROPIC_MODEL="eu.anthropic.claude-sonnet-4-6" uv run litellm-agent "what is the total spend for March for NHS England")
Bash(source .env && uv run litellm-agent "what is the total spend for March for NHS England")
